overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, foggy cyberpunk city street at night, transitioning from an open sidewalk to a covered highway underpass. The footage appears to be from a video game with cinematic ray-traced lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and neon-teal color grading.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban sidewalk alongside elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing street lamps and palm trees

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure running parallel to the sidewalk
multi-story building with illuminated windows and glass facade
ornate black lamppost casting warm yellow light through the rain
silver metal barrier separating sidewalk from road
tall palm tree in concrete planter on the sidewalk
overflowing garbage containers near the guard rail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane road. An elevated highway overpass looms on the right while a modern glass building stands on the left. Vintage street lamps cast warm glows through the fog and rain, reflecting off the slick pavement.

events.description: pedestrian approaches from the distance walking in the same direction
pedestrian passes by on the left and continues forward
walking under the elevated highway structure, sky becoming obscured

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as a pedestrian passes by, approaching the covered underpass area

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket walking ahead, then passing by on the left

segments.scene_description: A pedestrian appears in the distance and walks past the camera as the environment transitions toward the highway underpass. The modern building recedes behind while the overpass structure moves from the right side to directly overhead, creating a more enclosed feeling. The rain continues to fall heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with curved road

events.description: digital billboard becomes visible through the fog on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the underpass, following the curving sidewalk beneath the highway

entered.detail: illuminated advertising screen visible through the fog and rain
underside of the highway structure creating a tunnel-like enclosure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves fully under the highway overpass into a sheltered, tunnel-like space. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric, with street lamps creating dramatic cones of light in the fog. A digital billboard becomes visible in the distance on the left, and the road curves gently as the walk continues through this enclosed urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city that transitions from an open sidewalk into the sheltered depths of a highway underpass. It begins along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane road, where vintage street lamps cast warm glows through the fog and reflect off the slick pavement between a modern glass building and a looming overpass. As a pedestrian passes by, the camera moves forward and the modern building recedes, causing the overpass structure to shift from the right side to directly overhead. The scene then opens into a darker, tunnel-like space under the highway, where the heavy rain gives way to a more enclosed atmosphere. Finally, the camera continues through this urban canyon as dramatic cones of light pierce the fog and a digital billboard emerges in the distance along a gently curving road.
